about.paragraph:
I'm a cinematographer and director based in Toronto, Ontario, with a passion for visual storytelling that blends technical precision with emotional depth. My work explores themes of identity, memory, and human connection through a cinematic lens. 

With a background in Occupational Health and Safety Management, I bring a unique perspective to filmmaking and understand that the safest sets are often the most creative ones. I believe in preparation, precision, and the magic that happens when everything comes together perfectly. 

From intimate character studies to sweeping visual narratives, 
I approach every project with the same commitment to craft and collaboration. 
  
My film philosophy is simple: Every frame should serve the story, every light should reveal character, and every cut should propel the narrative forward.

camera.lens: Sony FE PZ 28-135mm f/4 G OSS Full-Frame Power Zoom Lens

services.title: Cinematography
services.description: Visual storytelling through lighting, composition, and camera movement. From narrative features to commercials.

services.title: Directing
services.description: Bringing scripts to life with vision, collaboration, and attention to every detail of the filmmaking process.

services.title: Color Grading
services.description: Enhancing mood and atmosphere through professional color correction and grading for any project.

services.title: Editing
services.description: Crafting the narrative rhythm and pacing through precise editing and storytelling techniques.

services.title: Screenwriting
services.description: Crafting compelling narratives with strong characters, meaningful themes, and cinematic potential.

services.title: VFX
services.description: Creating stunning visual effects that seamlessly integrate with live-action footage.

contact.formSuccess: Thank you for your message! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.message: "Every project begins with a conversation. Whether you have a fully developed script or just a spark of an idea, I'm here to help bring your vision to life. Let's discuss how we can collaborate to create something truly exceptional."
